content.en:
Time passed slowly, and Ye Tian gradually had some understanding of the black words representing space.

It can be said that if there is an Extreme Dao Ancestral Endowment, the speed of comprehension will be very fast, and if there is no Extreme Dao Ancestral Endowment, it will be too difficult to comprehend the mystery of the black text.

However, some Extreme Dao creatures only have one or two Extreme Dao Ancestors at most, so it is much faster to comprehend only one or two black characters in the corresponding one, and it is much slower to comprehend other black characters.

After spending a long time, Ye Tian successfully understood the black characters representing space, and then began to comprehend the black characters representing time.

Although he can't engrave the black text on the Pagoda of Will now, but now that he understands it, he can directly engrave it in the future!

"The value of this primordial divine weapon is too high, I really want to snatch it directly!"

Ye Tian muttered.

But as soon as he thought that if he snatched away this primordial divine weapon, he would inevitably have to fight with these palace masters of the Extreme Dao Deep Sea Palace, and then it would be exposed, and the unbounded lord would also know.

Moreover, the Lord's insight is definitely higher than him, and when the time comes to recognize this thing, he will inevitably turn against him, and even snatch it at all costs.

Therefore, he still dispelled this thought, and when his strength was raised to far surpass the Lord of the Unbounded, he would take this treasure then.

Anyway, he can now participate in enlightenment and cultivation here, and there is no need to rush to take away this primordial divine weapon.

In the following years, Ye Tian took out some treasures that he didn't need, such as those containing extreme powers, and traded them in exchange for the resources he needed, so as to improve his cultivation.

Moreover, the resources obtained from the Extreme Dao Deep Sea were also secretly sent to the end of the realm and given to their own ontological cultivation.

But even so, Ye Tian's cultivation improvement speed was still slow, and it would still take a long time to reach the limit of the Dual Ancestor.

"It's too difficult to ascend to the limit from the early stage of the Dual Ancestor, if you don't have incomparably precious resources, the time spent will be in trillions!" Ye Tian said darkly.

He felt that if he continued to cultivate step by step like this, it would take too long to ascend to the limit of the Dual Ancestor.

At the beginning, the Lord of the Boundless was able to ascend to the Triple Primordial Ancestor, but he was not promoted at the end of the realm, but went to the Primordial Black Sea, and with the opportunity, he was promoted to this realm.

Ye Tian didn't think about going to the wider Origin Domain, but the Unbounded Lord didn't reveal any news, obviously worried that the treasure land would be leaked by Ye Tian.

Therefore, Ye Tian couldn't help the Lord of the Boundless to take away the treasures in that treasure land, and he wouldn't reveal any news!

this day.

Ye Tian decided to go to the Lord of the Unbounded, he wanted to go to that treasure land in advance to help the Lord of the Unbounded find the treasure.

......

Soon, Ye Tian contacted the Lord of the Boundless and met him.

"Lord of the Unbounded, can I go to that treasure right now and take out the treasure you need?"

Ye Tian asked.

The Lord of the Boundless frowned: "Lord of Endless, you have not reached the Triple Origin Ancestor now, and if you do not reach the Triple Ancestor, you will definitely die." And even if I reach the Triple Ancestor, there is a great possibility of falling, which is why I don't dare to go over. "

"I just wanted to try it and see how dangerous that treasure land really is, that's all. Only when you know the gap, you can work harder to improve your strength!" Ye Tian said.

The Unbounded Lord pondered for a moment, but finally agreed.

"Yes, I'll take you there!"

The Unbounded Lord quickly took Ye Tian to shuttle to a positioning point, and then shuttled for a distance, and then came to a certain area of the primordial Black Sea.

There was nothing here, but Ye Tian sensed a special space-time fluctuation.

"This is it, as long as you comprehend the extreme path of time and space, you can shuttle into, this treasure land is not the original domain, but it is extremely dangerous, there are some very terrifying creatures in it, and it is very suppressive of our strength. Lord of Endless, you have comprehended the extreme path of time and space, and if you cultivate a few hundred trillion eternal years, you should be able to ascend to the limit of the double primordial ancestor, and this time is not long, just wait, I am not in a hurry. "The Unbounded Lord's Way.

Isn't a few trillion eternal years long?

Ye Tian was speechless, but didn't say anything.

For the Lord of the Unbounded, this is not a long time, but he thinks it is a long time!

And.

Ye Tian didn't want to delay for so long, who knew what would happen in the future, so he improved his strength as soon as possible, so that he had the strength to protect himself and his family!

In case of another incident of the Primordial Black Sea Creature invading the end of the realm, such as the appearance of an incomparably terrifying Triple Primordial Black Beast, even the Lord of the Boundless cannot stop it, then who will it depend on?

Therefore, self-strength is the greatest guarantee!

"Lord of Endless, this is the place where the treasure I need is this, if you are really lucky enough to find it, give it to me. With a wave of his hand, the Unbounded Lord revealed.

This is a nine-colored golden lotus, and each petal is engraved with an extreme aura.

"Its name is the Nine Extremes Golden Lotus, remember, if you really find it, if you want to pick it, you can't use your hands or other energy, it's useless, you have to pick it with the power of the Extreme Pole, and after picking, wrap it with the power of the Extreme Pole to keep it from withering. The Unbounded Lord reminded.

Immediately, the Lord of the Boundless gave another piece of information to pass to Ye Tian, but there was not much information.

Because the Lord of the Boundless only entered for a while, he didn't know what he knew, and he only sensed the breath of the Nine Extremes Golden Lotus, so he was sure that there was a Nine Extremes Golden Lotus in it.

Then, the Unbounded Lord was gone.

Because he confirmed that Ye Tian would not be able to obtain the Nine Extremes Golden Lotus, and after entering, he would soon be killed, wasting a will clone.

After the Unbounded Lord left, Ye Tian did not hesitate and escaped directly into it.

......

Rumble!!!!

As soon as he came in, the power of this piece of heaven and earth was suppressing Ye Tian, although it would not exclude him, but it limited most of his strength.

Abrupt.

A monster with countless tentacles emerged and attacked him.

Seeing this, Ye Tian burst out with all his strength.

All kinds of extreme extreme path powers erupted from Ye Tian's body, and the body of the original ancestor also exploded, and all kinds of top extreme path control techniques were also displayed by Ye Tian one by one.

Thundered!!!

Ye Tian continued to fight with this monster, and soon attracted other monsters.

It can be said that the monsters here have the weakest strength to surpass the dual ancestors, and some have even reached the realm of the triple ancestors.

Soon, Ye Tian was hit hard.

However, Ye Tian did not withdraw, but forcibly broke the blockade circle and continued to go deeper to understand the situation here.

Not long after, Ye Tian's will clone fell under the attack of many creatures.

So, Ye Tian continued to send a replica body into the investigation.

In this way, the body of the replica fell and reproduced again, gradually allowing Ye Tian to understand a lot about this treasure land, and even the Lord of the Unbounded was far less than he knew.
